name: Git Auto-Commit & Push
description: Snapshot a working repository on a schedule: stage everything, commit, and push.
commandTemplate: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "git -C '{{repoPath}}' add -A; git -C '{{repoPath}}' commit -m '{{message}}'; git -C '{{repoPath}}' push"

parameters.label: Repository path
parameters.help: Absolute path to the local git repository.

parameters.label: Commit message
parameters.help: Message used for each scheduled commit. Avoid single quotes.
